category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Zambian market (ZABS conformity, ZS/IEC standards, energy labelling, ZICTA radio approval).

title.en: China-to-Zambia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入赞比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入尚比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Zambian market-access requirements — Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) conformity and import inspection, ZS/IEC 60598 and ZS/IEC 62560 lamp safety standards, energy-efficiency labelling, and ZICTA type approval for radio-enabled smart lighting — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与赞比亚市场准入要求差距对照——赞比亚标准局（ZABS）符合性及进口检验、ZS/IEC 60598 与 ZS/IEC 62560 灯具安全标准、能效标签，以及无线智能照明的 ZICTA 型号核准——与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與尚比亞市場准入要求差距對照——尚比亞標準局（ZABS）符合性及進口檢驗、ZS/IEC 60598 與 ZS/IEC 62560 燈具安全標準、能效標籤，以及無線智能照明的 ZICTA 型號核准——與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Zambian law, ZABS compulsory standards and import inspection requirements, applicable ZS/IEC standards, energy-labelling rules, and ZICTA type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the relevant Zambian authorities before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及赞比亚相关主管部门核验现行赞比亚法律、ZABS 强制标准及进口检验要求、适用的 ZS/IEC 标准、能效标签规则及 ZICTA 型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及尚比亞相關主管部門核驗現行尚比亞法律、ZABS 強制標準及進口檢驗要求、適用的 ZS/IEC 標準、能效標籤規則及 ZICTA 型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Zambia must meet Zambia Bureau of Standards (ZABS) conformity and import-inspection requirements, which adopt IEC-based Zambian Standards (ZS/IEC 60598 for luminaire safety, ZS/IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, ZS/CISPR 15 for EMC); ensure the product is rated for Zambia's 230 V / 50 Hz grid (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V / 380 V); satisfy any applicable energy-efficiency labelling programme administered for lighting; obtain ZICTA type approval if the luminaire incorporates radio functionality (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth smart lighting); and route the import through an in-country importer with the required ZABS documentation. Zambia does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS / REACH / energy-label regime, so substance restrictions, photobiological-class labelling, and supply-chain SVHC notification are not mandated the way they are in the EU — but China's CCC and GB-standard evidence do not by themselves satisfy ZABS conformity, and re-testing or conformity assessment to the applicable ZS/IEC standards is generally needed.
answer_first.zh: 向赞比亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：满足赞比亚标准局（ZABS）的符合性及进口检验要求，这些要求采用基于 IEC 的赞比亚标准（灯具安全 ZS/IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯 ZS/IEC 62560、EMC ZS/CISPR 15）；确保产品适配赞比亚 230 V / 50 Hz 电网（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的 220 V / 380 V）；满足适用于照明的任何能效标签计划；若灯具集成无线功能（Wi-Fi / 蓝牙智能照明）则取得 ZICTA 型号核准；并通过具备所需 ZABS 文件的在地进口商办理进口。赞比亚不实行欧盟式的横向 RoHS / REACH / 能效标签体系，因此物质限制、光生物等级标注及供应链 SVHC 通报不像欧盟那样被强制——但中国的 CCC 及 GB 标准证据本身不足以满足 ZABS 符合性，通常仍需按适用的 ZS/IEC 标准重新检测或进行合格评定。
answer_first.zht: 向尚比亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：滿足尚比亞標準局（ZABS）的符合性及進口檢驗要求，這些要求採用基於 IEC 的尚比亞標準（燈具安全 ZS/IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈 ZS/IEC 62560、EMC ZS/CISPR 15）；確保產品適配尚比亞 230 V / 50 Hz 電網（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220 V / 380 V）；滿足適用於照明的任何能效標籤計劃；若燈具集成無線功能（Wi-Fi / 藍牙智能照明）則取得 ZICTA 型號核准；並通過具備所需 ZABS 文件的在地進口商辦理進口。尚比亞不實行歐盟式的橫向 RoHS / REACH / 能效標籤體系，因此物質限制、光生物等級標註及供應鏈 SVHC 通報不像歐盟那樣被強制——但中國的 CCC 及 GB 標準證據本身不足以滿足 ZABS 符合性，通常仍需按適用的 ZS/IEC 標準重新檢測或進行合格評定。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon change to ZABS compulsory standards, ZS adoptions, energy-label programmes, or ZICTA type-approval rules
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Zambia is landlocked and does not operate EU-style horizontal RoHS/REACH/energy-label regimes; where the spec maps an EU horizontal regime to Zambia, the absence of an equivalent must be stated plainly rather than asserting a non-existent Zambian obligation. ZS/IEC adoption status and ZABS compulsory-standard listings must be re-verified against ZABS sources each cycle.
